title: Limit God Apples
description: Limits the number of god apples a player can have in their inventory
body:
# Limit God Apples

Limits the number of god apples each player can have in their inventory at once. 

The default limit is 5.

## Commands

`/trigger ReclaimGodApple` reclaim a god apple after it was taken

**require OP**:

`/scoreboard players set GodApple_Limit GodApples (number)` set the limit to a number
`/scoreboard players set (player) AllowGodAppleLimitBypass 1` allow a player to have more god apples than the limit
`/scoreboard players set (player) AllowGodAppleLimitBypass 0` disallow a player to have more god apples than the limit
